storyBeat: Liu Bei 是好領袖 — 他需要一位有智慧的朋友

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 leader = 領袖
🔑 kind = 善良
🔑 need = 需要
🔑 smart = 聰明
準備好了嗎？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Long ago in China, there lived a kind leader named Liu Bei.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前在中國，有個善良的領袖叫劉備——奶奶說，這個名字是「好人」的代名詞。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei was warm to his soldiers and gentle with the village people.
questions.question: How did Liu Bei treat the people around him?
questions.explanationZh: 對士兵暖心、對村民溫柔——「用溫暖和關心」就是他對待大家的方式。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備對兵士溫柔，對村民也和善。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: But fighting and trouble filled the land in those years.
questions.questionEn: Were times peaceful when Liu Bei lived?
questions.explanationZh: 那個年代，打打殺殺、麻煩不斷——不和平，答 No。劉備的日子可不好過。
questions.sentenceZh: 但那些年，整片土地充滿了爭鬥和動亂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei had two brave brothers, but no one with a clever mind.
questions.explanationZh: 他有兩個勇敢的兄弟，可是沒有一個「腦袋裝滿計謀」的人。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Brave hearts could fight, but a smart head was needed to plan.
questions.question: What did Liu Bei's team still need?
options: a person with a clever head
a faster horse for the road
questions.explanationZh: 打仗靠勇氣，但要贏靠智慧——「一個有聰明頭腦的人」就是他們最缺的。
questions.sentenceZh: 勇敢的心可以打仗，但還需要一個聰明的頭腦來謀劃。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He sat by his window at night, thinking about the years ahead.
questions.explanationZh: 他晚上坐在窗邊，看著遠方，想著以後的日子。這樣的夜晚，很長。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "I must find a wise friend, or our work will fail."
questions.question: What did Liu Bei decide he must do?
optionsZh: 去找一位有智慧的朋友
questions.explanationZh: 「我必須找到一個有智慧的朋友，不然我們的事業會失敗。」——「去找一位有智慧的朋友」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我必須找到一個智慧的朋友，否則我們的大業會失敗。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Liu Bei feel about his future?
questions.question: How did Liu Bei feel?
questions.explanationZh: 戰亂年代，又擔心又有希望——「擔心但有希望」就是劉備的心情。那個 🤔 很像他。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備對自己的前途有什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He shared his worry with the two brothers by the warm fire.
questions.explanationZh: 他靠著火堆的暖意，把心裡的擔心說給兩個兄弟聽。三個人，圍著一個火，說著一個夢。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei had brave fighters, but he was missing one important kind of help.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: Liu Bei needs a wise mind on his team
Liu Bei wants to sell his sword
Liu Bei plans a big party
Liu Bei goes back to farming
optionsZh: 劉備需要一個有智慧的人加入
questions.explanationZh: 劉備需要一個有智慧的人加入——這就是這一節最重要的事。其他選項都偏了。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備有勇猛的武將，但少了一種重要的幫助。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Tomorrow," he said softly, "we begin the search..."
questions.explanationZh: 「明天，」他輕輕說，「我們開始找……」——奶奶說，這一句，是三顧茅廬的起點。

storyBeat: 村人指路 — Zhuge Liang 住在山上的小屋

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 villager = 村人
🔑 hill = 山
🔑 small house = 小屋
🔑 quiet = 靜的
線索快出現了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei asked the villagers about smart people in the land.
questions.explanationZh: 劉備問村人：這片土地上，有沒有什麼厲害的聰明人？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: An old man stepped forward and tapped his walking stick.
questions.question: Who answered Liu Bei first?
options: a young child on the road
an old man with a stick
a busy cook from the inn
questions.explanationZh: 一個拿拐杖的老人走上前，敲了敲拐杖——「一個拿拐杖的老人」就是最先回答的人。
questions.sentenceZh: 一位老人走上前，用手杖敲了敲地。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The old man's eyes shone when he heard the name Zhuge Liang.
questions.questionEn: Did the old man know about Zhuge Liang?
questions.explanationZh: 老人一聽到「諸葛亮」，眼睛就發亮了——眼睛亮 = 認識他，答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 聽到諸葛亮這個名字，老人眼睛亮了起來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Zhuge Liang is the smartest man in all the hills," he said.
questions.explanationZh: 「諸葛亮是這些山裡最聰明的人。」——老人說這話的時候，聲音裡有敬意。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "He lives in a small house far up the green hill."
questions.question: Where does Zhuge Liang live?
options: in a small house on a hill
by the river in a boat
questions.explanationZh: 「他住在山上的小屋。」——「在山上的小屋」就是答案，不是市集、不是皇宮。
questions.sentenceZh: 「他住在山上的一間小屋裡，遠遠的。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "He reads many books and grows his own food there."
questions.explanationZh: 「他在那裡讀很多書，自己種食物。」——活得簡單，卻活得很豐富。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei's eyes lit up at every word the old man said.
questions.question: How did Liu Bei feel about the news?
options: angry and red in the face
questions.explanationZh: 老人說的每句話，都讓劉備的眼睛亮一點——「興奮又充滿希望」就是他的感受。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人說的每一句話，劉備的眼睛都亮了一下。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He thanked the old man with a deep bow and a soft voice.
questions.explanationZh: 他深深鞠一躬，輕聲謝謝老人。這個動作，說明他是個懂得感恩的人。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: What did Liu Bei plan to do next?
questions.question: What was his next step?
options: ⛰️ climb the hill to the house
questions.explanationZh: 知道地點了，下一步當然是「爬山到那間小屋」！那個 ⛰️ 就是他的下一步。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備打算接下來怎麼做？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The old man told Liu Bei that the wisest man he knew was hiding in the quiet hills.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: Liu Bei finds out where the wise man lives
Liu Bei loses his map on the long road
Liu Bei sells his sword to buy a horse
Liu Bei meets a great king in the city
optionsZh: 劉備知道智者住在哪裡
劉備在長路上弄丟了地圖
劉備在城裡遇見一位大王
questions.explanationZh: 劉備知道智者住在哪裡——這就是這一節的重點。其他選項都不對。
questions.sentenceZh: 老人告訴劉備，他認識的最有智慧的人，正隱居在幽靜的山中。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He called his brothers, and the three set off the next morning...
questions.explanationZh: 他叫上兩個兄弟，三人第二天早上出發——奶奶說，這就是「三顧茅廬」的第一顧。

storyBeat: 第一次拜訪 — 小屋的門關著, Zhuge Liang 不在家

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 visit = 拜訪
🔑 door = 門
🔑 knock = 敲
🔑 away = 走開
第一次拜訪，緊張！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The three rode their horses up the green hill in the spring sun.
questions.explanationZh: 春日陽光下，三人騎馬上山——路上肯定有春風，有鳥叫，還有三顆期待的心。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: They saw a small wooden house with bamboo around it.
questions.question: What was around Zhuge Liang's house?
questions.explanationZh: 一間木頭小屋，四周圍著竹子——「綠色的竹子」就是答案。安靜得像畫一樣。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們看到一間小木屋，四周圍著竹子。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei stepped down from his horse and walked to the door.
questions.explanationZh: 劉備下馬，走到門前——他親自來，不叫別人代勞。這就是他的風格。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He knocked three times, soft and slow, with the back of his hand.
questions.question: How did Liu Bei knock on the door?
options: loud and hard, like a soldier
optionsZh: 又大聲又用力,像士兵那樣
questions.explanationZh: 他用手背，輕輕地、慢慢地敲了三下——「輕輕又慢」就是答案。不是士兵那種猛敲。
questions.sentenceZh: 他輕輕敲了三下，用手背，慢慢地敲。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A young boy opened the door and looked up at Liu Bei.
questions.questionEn: Was Zhuge Liang the one who opened the door?
questions.explanationZh: 開門的不是諸葛亮，是一個小男孩——「不是諸葛亮」，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個小男孩開了門，抬頭看著劉備。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "My teacher is away today. He has gone to see a friend."
questions.explanationZh: 「我老師今天出門去看朋友了。」——劉備白跑一趟，心裡一定很不是滋味。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei kept his soft smile, even though his heart felt heavy.
questions.question: How did Liu Bei show his feelings?
options: he hid them behind a smile
he let big tears fall down
he turned and ran far away
questions.explanationZh: 他保持著微笑，但心裡很重——「用微笑藏起來」就是他的做法。這叫「風度」。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備心裡很沉，但還是保持著溫和的微笑。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Please tell him Liu Bei came today," he said with a bow.
questions.explanationZh: 「請告訴他，劉備今天來過。」——他留下名字，鞠躬道別，禮貌到最後。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Liu Bei feel as he rode back down?
questions.question: How did Liu Bei feel?
questions.explanationZh: 白跑一趟，當然「有一點難過」——那個 😞 就是他下山的心情。
questions.sentenceZh: 下山的路上，劉備心裡是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei climbed the hill, but the wise man's door opened to a boy, not to him.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: the first visit ends without a meeting
Liu Bei moves into the house
Liu Bei meets the wise man at last
the boy becomes Liu Bei's teacher
questions.explanationZh: 第一次拜訪沒見到人——這就是這一節的重點。其他選項都不對。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備爬上山，開門的卻是個小男孩，不是他要找的人。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He looked back at the small house and said, "I will come again..."
questions.explanationZh: 他回頭看那間小屋，說：「我會再來……」——奶奶說，這三個字裡藏著一種叫「決心」的東西。

storyBeat: 第二次拜訪 — 雪天再去, 還是不在家

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 snow = 雪
🔑 cold = 冷
🔑 again = 再
🔑 wait = 等
冬天來了，劉備還是要去！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Winter came, and white snow covered every road and tree.
questions.explanationZh: 白雪蓋住每條路和每棵樹——整個世界都白了，路變得很難走。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei said, "Today we will visit the small house again."
questions.question: What did Liu Bei plan to do that day?
options: stay inside and rest all day
go to the small house once more
buy new winter boots in town
wait at home for the spring
questions.explanationZh: 劉備說：「今天我們再去一次小屋。」——「再去一次小屋」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備說：「今天我們再去那間小屋看看。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The brothers told him it was too cold and too far to ride that day.
questions.questionEn: Did the brothers want to go with him?
questions.explanationZh: 兄弟說太冷太遠了，不想去——「不想去」，答 No。兩兄弟打退堂鼓。
questions.sentenceZh: 兄弟們告訴他，那天太冷、路太遠，不適合去。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: But Liu Bei put on his thick coat and got on his horse anyway.
questions.explanationZh: 劉備穿上厚外套，還是出發了。兄弟說不去，他一個人也要去。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Snow fell on his hat and the horse's mane all the way up the hill.
questions.question: What was the weather like on the trip?
questions.explanationZh: 雪落在帽子和馬鬃上——「下雪又冷」就是答案。但劉備一路都沒回頭。
questions.sentenceZh: 雪花落在他的帽子和馬的鬃毛上，一路飄到山頂。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: He knocked on the small door, with snow still on his shoulders.
questions.explanationZh: 他敲了敲小門，肩膀上還有雪——這個畫面，奶奶覺得很美，也很讓人佩服。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The same young boy opened the door and gave a small bow.
questions.question: Who opened the door this time?
options: no one came to the door
questions.explanationZh: 開門的還是同一個男孩——「同一個男孩」，劉備心裡肯定「又是你……」
questions.sentenceZh: 同一個小男孩開了門，輕輕鞠了個躬。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "My teacher is still away. He went out before the snow began."
questions.explanationZh: 「老師還是不在，下雪前就出門了。」——又白跑一趟。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: How did Liu Bei look as he rode home in the snow?
questions.question: How did he look?
questions.explanationZh: 雪天白跑兩次——「安靜又疲倦」就是他回程的樣子。但他沒生氣。
questions.sentenceZh: 雪中騎馬回家的路上，劉備看起來怎麼樣？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Even in deep snow, Liu Bei made the long ride, but the wise man was still not there.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: Liu Bei moves to the hill
questions.explanationZh: 第二次拜訪也沒見到人——這就是重點。但劉備在寒冷的路上默默許下「再試一次」的承諾。
questions.sentenceZh: 就算在深雪裡，劉備還是去了，但智者仍然不在。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: On the cold ride home, he made a quiet promise to try once more...
questions.explanationZh: 在寒冷的回程路上，他心裡悄悄說：「再試一次……」——奶奶說，這就是「劉備」和普通人的差別。

storyBeat: 兄弟說「他只是農夫」— 劉備堅持要第三次

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 brother = 兄弟
🔑 farmer = 農夫
🔑 just = 只是
🔑 why = 為什麼
兄弟有話說……

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Spring came around again, and Liu Bei put on his riding boots.
questions.explanationZh: 春天又來了，劉備穿起騎馬的靴子——他沒忘記那個承諾。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "I will go up the hill one more time," he said to his brothers.
questions.question: What did Liu Bei tell his brothers?
options: he would try a third visit
he was moving to a new town
he had a new plan to fight
questions.explanationZh: 「我再去一次山上的小屋。」——「再去第三次」就是他告訴兄弟的事。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我要再上山一次。」他對兄弟們說。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His big brother folded his arms and turned away with a hard face.
questions.questionEn: Was the brother happy about the third trip?
questions.explanationZh: 大哥雙手交叉、板著臉轉身——「不開心」，答 No。他受夠了。
questions.sentenceZh: 大哥抱著雙臂，冷冷地轉過身去。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Why try again? He is just a farmer who reads books."
questions.explanationZh: 「為什麼還要再去？他只是個讀書的農夫。」——大哥這樣說，其實是心疼劉備白跑。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The brother said the wise man was not worth two visits, much less three.
questions.question: What did the brother think of Zhuge Liang?
options: he was not worth so many visits
he was a dear old friend
he was too sick and weak to talk
optionsZh: 他病得太重沒辦法說話
questions.explanationZh: 大哥說，他不值得去那麼多次——「不值得去那麼多次」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 大哥說那個智者一次都不值得去，更別說去三次了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei put a soft hand on his brother's shoulder.
questions.explanationZh: 劉備輕輕把手放在大哥肩上——這個動作很溫柔，說：「我理解你，但我還是要去。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "A good leader shows that he honors the wise, not the other way."
questions.question: What did Liu Bei believe about good leaders?
options: they should show honor to wise people
they should never ride a horse
they should keep all gold for themselves
optionsZh: 要對有智慧的人表現尊重
questions.explanationZh: 「好的領袖，要對有智慧的人表現尊重。」——「要對有智慧的人表現尊重」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 「好的領導者要展示自己敬重賢者，而不是讓賢者來找自己。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The brothers looked at each other and slowly nodded their heads.
questions.explanationZh: 兩個兄弟互看一眼，慢慢點頭——他們被說服了，跟著去。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: What did Liu Bei show in this scene?
questions.question: What did he show?
questions.explanationZh: 他堅持再去、不嫌煩——「耐心和尊重」就是劉備在這一幕展示的東西。那個 🌱 最像。
questions.sentenceZh: 在這一幕裡，劉備展現了什麼？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His brothers wanted to stop, but Liu Bei would not give up on the wise man.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: the brothers leave him for good
questions.explanationZh: 劉備的耐心和尊重——這就是這一節的主旨。其他選項都偏了。
questions.sentenceZh: 兄弟們想放棄，但劉備不願放棄那位智者。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The three got on their horses one more time and rode toward the hill...
questions.explanationZh: 三人再次上馬，朝著山騎去……奶奶說，這次去，命運不一樣了。

storyBeat: 第三次拜訪 — 風很冷, 他們在門外等

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 wind = 風
🔑 asleep = 睡著
🔑 softly = 輕輕
🔑 outside = 外面
這次，劉備真的等到了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The wind was cold and sharp that morning on the hill.
questions.explanationZh: 那天早上，山上的風又冷又刺——比上次下雪那天還難熬。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The same young boy opened the door, and his eyes went wide.
questions.question: How did the boy react to seeing Liu Bei again?
questions.explanationZh: 同一個男孩開門，眼睛瞪得大大的——「非常驚訝」就是他的反應。他沒想到他們還會來。
questions.sentenceZh: 同一個小男孩開了門，眼睛瞪得圓圓的。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "My teacher is at home today, but he is asleep on his couch."
questions.explanationZh: 「老師今天在家，但在椅子上睡著了。」——在家！但睡著了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei told the boy not to wake his teacher up.
questions.questionEn: Did Liu Bei want the boy to wake the wise man?
questions.explanationZh: 劉備叫男孩不要叫醒老師——他不想打擾，答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備叫小男孩不要吵醒他的老師。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "We will wait outside in the wind. Let him rest."
questions.question: Where did Liu Bei choose to wait?
questions.explanationZh: 「我們在外面冷風裡等，讓他休息。」——「在外面冷風裡」就是答案。這需要很大的尊重。
questions.sentenceZh: 「我們在外面風中等，讓他好好睡。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The brothers shook in the cold, but Liu Bei stood still and quiet.
questions.explanationZh: 兄弟們冷得發抖，劉備靜靜站著——這個對比，奶奶說，就是「修養」。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Time passed slowly, and the sun moved across the cold sky.
questions.question: How long did Liu Bei wait?
questions.explanationZh: 太陽慢慢移過天空——「很長一段時間」就是答案。不是一下子，是一直等。
questions.sentenceZh: 時間慢慢流逝，太陽在寒冷的天空中移動著。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: At last, the wise man inside turned over and let out a soft sound.
questions.explanationZh: 最後，屋裡的智者翻了個身，輕輕出聲——他醒了……

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: What did Liu Bei show by waiting in the cold?
questions.question: What did he show?
questions.explanationZh: 為了不打擾他休息，在冷風裡等——「充滿尊重」就是答案。那個 🤝 就是劉備的心意。
questions.sentenceZh: 在冷風中等待，劉備展現了什麼？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: On his third trip, Liu Bei stayed in the cold wind so the sleeping wise man could rest.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: Liu Bei's deep respect for the wise man
Liu Bei's wish to leave fast
the brothers' new plan for the army
the boy's clever trick at the door
optionsZh: 劉備對智者深深的尊重
questions.explanationZh: 劉備對智者深深的尊重——這就是這一節的主旨。其他選項都偏了。
questions.sentenceZh: 第三次，劉備在寒風中等候，不忍打擾熟睡的智者。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Slow steps came toward the door from inside the small house...
questions.explanationZh: 慢慢的腳步聲從屋裡走向門口……奶奶說，這個腳步聲，是整個故事等待最久的聲音。

storyBeat: Zhuge Liang 開門 — 「你來了三次, 我會幫你」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字：
🔑 three times = 三次
🔑 help = 幫
🔑 thank = 謝謝
🔑 heart = 心
終於見到了！

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: The door opened, and a tall man in a grey robe stepped out.
questions.explanationZh: 門開了，走出來一個穿灰袍的高個子——他就是諸葛亮。奶奶說，有些人出現，一眼就知道不一樣。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: His eyes were soft, and a small smile was on his mouth.
questions.question: How did Zhuge Liang look?
questions.explanationZh: 眼神柔和，嘴角有一個小小的笑——「柔和又溫和」就是答案。他的氣質是這樣的。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的眼神柔和，嘴角帶著淡淡的笑意。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Liu Bei dropped his head into a deep, slow bow.
questions.questionEn: Did Liu Bei greet him with great respect?
questions.explanationZh: 劉備深深、慢慢地鞠了一個大躬——「非常尊重」，答 Yes。這個躬，低到地板了。
questions.sentenceZh: 劉備低下頭，深深地鞠了一個躬。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "I am here to ask for your help, sir," Liu Bei said softly.
questions.explanationZh: 「先生，我來請您幫忙。」——輕聲說，沒有命令，沒有要求，只有請求。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "You came to my door three times. You did not give up."
questions.question: What did Zhuge Liang notice about Liu Bei?
options: that he did not give up
that he had a fast horse
questions.explanationZh: 「你來了三次，沒有放棄。」——諸葛亮注意到的，就是「沒有放棄」。
questions.sentenceZh: 「你三次來到我的門前，你沒有放棄。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "Your heart is true, and you treat me as a friend, not a tool."
questions.explanationZh: 「你的心是真的，你把我當朋友，不是工具。」——這句話讓劉備的眼眶紅了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: "For these reasons, I will leave my house and help you."
questions.question: What did Zhuge Liang say he would do?
options: stay home and read his books
go with Liu Bei and help him
questions.explanationZh: 「因為這些，我願意離開這裡，去幫你。」——「跟劉備走 + 幫他」就是答案。
questions.sentenceZh: 「為這些，我願意離開我的屋子，來幫助你。」

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tears of joy filled Liu Bei's eyes as he thanked him again and again.
questions.explanationZh: 劉備眼眶滿滿的，一次又一次謝謝他——三次拜訪、三個冬天，終於值了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: What is the main lesson from tonight's story?
questions.question: What does the story teach?
options: 💪 win every fight fast and never rest
🌱 a true heart and patience open every door
💰 money can buy everything you need
🏃 run away from every hard thing you meet
optionsZh: 每場仗都要快贏,從不休息
真心和耐心能打開每一扇門
錢可以買到你需要的一切
遇到的每件難事都逃走
questions.explanationZh: 三次拜訪 + 在冷風等待 → 「真心和耐心能打開每一扇門」就是故事的道理。那個 🌱 就是這顆心。
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事，主要想告訴我們什麼？

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Zhuge Liang said yes to Liu Bei because his heart was true and he kept coming back.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: patience and respect win a great friend
the brothers find a new home
the boy becomes the new leader
the cold wind ends the search
optionsZh: 耐心和尊重贏得了好朋友
questions.explanationZh: 耐心和尊重贏得了好朋友——這就是最後一節的主旨。
questions.sentenceZh: 諸葛亮答應了，因為劉備的心是真誠的，而且一再回來。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: And so two great hearts joined as one — the leader and his new wise friend...
questions.explanationZh: 兩顆偉大的心連在一起——領袖和智者，開始了他們的故事……奶奶說，這個結局只是另一個開始。
